narrative:
Strongsville-02-D (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 923 registered voters, with 57.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.7%, a modest Republican lean of 5.1 percentage points.
